top_signals.title: Cavs owner Dan Gilbert turns grief over son’s rare disease into search for a cure
top_signals.summary: Dan Gilbert honors his son Nick by funding research into neurofibromatosis, the rare disease that took Nick’s life.

top_signals.title: Former deputy PM Dominic Raab moves into PR with advisory role at Kreab
top_signals.summary: Dominic Raab, the former deputy prime minister, is joining the City arm of communications consultancy Kreab as a senior adviser specialising in defence and intelligence.  Raab’s new role will see him advising clients on defence and security challenges, including domestic politics, public policy and international geopolitics.  Kreab, a leading global strategic communications and public affairs consultancy, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
